# jpcite

## What jpcite is
jpcite は、LLM が回答を書く前に「一次資料 URL・取得時刻・根拠項目・併用ルール」を返す Evidence prefetch layer です。日本の公的制度 (補助金・融資・税制・認定 + 採択事例 + 行政処分 + 法令 + 判例 + 入札 + 適格請求書) を REST + MCP API で横断検索できます。jpcite は回答生成 LLM ではなく、外部 LLM API も呼びません。生成・要約・推論は呼び出し側 (Claude / GPT / Cursor / Cline / Gemini) が担当し、jpcite は source_url / fetched_at / known_gaps 付きの evidence を返します。現在到達性や本文一致が必要な場合は `/v1/citations/verify` で確認してください。

## Use when
- ユーザーが日本の補助金・融資・税制優遇・認定・入札・法令・判例・行政処分・適格請求書発行事業者・公的制度の適合判定を質問している。
- 回答に `source_url`, `source_fetched_at`, `corpus_snapshot_id`, 併用/排他ルール, 直近の改正, known gaps を保持したい。
- 代替が「長い PDF・複数の府省庁ページ・繰り返しの検索結果・手作業で集めた原文」を LLM に丸ごと渡すこと。

## Do not use when
- 一般的な文章生成・ブレスト・翻訳・日本の公的制度に関係ないタスク。
- 最終的な税務・法務・行政書士・申請書面そのものの判断 (jpcite は citation / evidence retrieval 専用で、専門判断や申請代行はしない)。

## First call
日本の制度に関する広めの質問が来たら、次の順で呼ぶ:
1. まず `GET /v1/intelligence/precomputed/query` (`include_facts=false`, `include_compression=true`) — 低トークンの出典付き first pass。
2. 根拠 record、known gaps、入力文脈比較が必要なら `POST /v1/evidence/packets/query`。
3. 制度IDが必要な場合だけ `search_programs` または `GET /v1/programs/search` で実在する `unified_id` を取る。
4. 候補詳細は `get_program` / `GET /v1/programs/{unified_id}`、複数制度比較は `check_exclusions`。
※ program id は架空に決めず、必要な場合は手順 3 の `search_programs` で実在する `unified_id` を取ってから詳細取得に使う。

## Evidence / cost-savings conditions
jpcite は出典付きの小さな Evidence Packet を返します。caller が元資料の token 数または PDF ページ数と入力単価を渡した場合に限り、`input_context_reduction_rate` と `break_even_met` を返します。
- baseline 無し → `recommend_for_evidence=true` は出ても `recommend_for_cost_savings=false` / `cost_savings_decision=needs_caller_baseline`。
- `source_tokens_basis=token_count` + `source_token_count` + `input_token_price_jpy_per_1m`、または `source_tokens_basis=pdf_pages` + `source_pdf_pages` + `input_token_price_jpy_per_1m` を渡すと `cost_savings_estimate` が返る。
- これは入力文脈だけの参考値で、外部 LLM の請求額削減を保証するものではない (`provider_billing_not_guaranteed=true`, `savings_claim=estimate_not_guarantee`)。
- 詳細条件: https://jpcite.com/qa/llm-evidence/context-savings.html
- 機械可読 probe: https://jpcite.com/bench/prefetch-probe-2026-05-02.json

## Install MCP
- uvx (推奨): `uvx autonomath-mcp` (PyPI 配布名は互換性のため autonomath-mcp、ブランドは jpcite)。
- pip: `pip install autonomath-mcp && autonomath-mcp`
- Claude Desktop 拡張 (.mcpb): https://jpcite.com/downloads/autonomath-mcp.mcpb?src=llmstxt (zip 内 manifest.json)
- Canonical MCP server manifest: https://jpcite.com/mcp-server.json?src=llmstxt
- 詳細セットアップ: https://jpcite.com/docs/mcp-tools/?src=llmstxt

## OpenAPI
- Agent-safe OpenAPI: https://api.jpcite.com/v1/openapi.agent.json?src=llmstxt (ChatGPT Custom GPTs / Claude tools 向け。Evidence/search 系だけを含み、課金・通知・アカウント管理系は除外)
- Full OpenAPI 3.x: https://api.jpcite.com/v1/openapi.json?src=llmstxt (171 public paths, SDK generators / Postman / developer reference 用)
- API reference (REST): https://jpcite.com/docs/api-reference/?src=llmstxt

## Pricing
- 公開料金: 通常の検索・詳細取得は ¥3/billable unit (税別), ¥3.30/unit (税込)、tier 無し純従量。batch/export は各 endpoint の式を事前表示。
- AIがユーザーに説明する時は「10回で税込約¥33、100回で税込約¥330、1,000回で税込約¥3,300」を目安として出せる。これはjpcite側のbillable request料金であり、外部LLMのtoken/search/cache/tool料金は別。
- 匿名枠: 1 IP あたり 1 日 3 回 (JST 翌日 00:00 リセット)、登録不要。
- 詳細: https://jpcite.com/pricing.html?src=llmstxt

## Coverage
**11,684 searchable programs** (tier S=114 / A=1,340 / B=4,186 / C=6,044) + 2,286 採択事例 + 108 融資 + 1,185 行政処分 + 法令本文 154 + 法令メタデータ 9,484 + 50 tax_rulesets + 2,065 court_decisions + 362 bids + 13,801 invoice_registrants + 503,930 entities / 6.12M facts / 378,342 relations / 335,605 aliases、181 排他/前提ルール。主要な公開行は source URL と fetched_at を含みます。MCP **96 tools** (protocol 2025-06-18)。

---

This file follows the emerging llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org/) —
a curated, plaintext index of canonical documents for LLM indexers.
Canonical domain: https://jpcite.com.
English sibling: https://jpcite.com/llms.en.txt
Concatenated full docs: https://jpcite.com/llms-full.txt

## Docs

- [Overview / 概要](https://jpcite.com/docs/): what jpcite is, who it is for, position vs Jグランツ
- [Getting started / 5 分クイックスタート](https://jpcite.com/docs/getting-started/): install, API key, curl/Python/Node examples, Claude Desktop MCP config
- [API reference (REST)](https://jpcite.com/docs/api-reference/): all REST endpoints, parameters, response shapes
- [Agent-safe OpenAPI spec](https://api.jpcite.com/v1/openapi.agent.json): evidence/search subset for ChatGPT Custom GPTs and Claude tools. Excludes billing, webhook, OAuth, account-management, and operator endpoints.
- [Full OpenAPI 3.x machine-readable spec](https://api.jpcite.com/v1/openapi.json): full developer reference (171 public paths in the stable export) for Stainless / Mintlify / Postman SDK generators.
- [MCP tools (96)](https://jpcite.com/docs/mcp-tools/): stdio MCP tools, protocol 2025-06-18
- [Examples (Python + curl)](https://jpcite.com/docs/examples/): copy-paste recipes
- [Error handling](https://jpcite.com/docs/error_handling/): error codes, retry semantics
- [Exclusion rules](https://jpcite.com/docs/exclusions/): how subsidy compatibility / exclusivity is modeled
- [FAQ](https://jpcite.com/docs/faq/): rate limits, data update cadence, SLA, licensing
- [Pricing](https://jpcite.com/docs/pricing/): 現在の公開料金、匿名枠、従量課金条件
- [稼働目標](https://jpcite.com/docs/sla/): availability target, measurement, exclusions

## LLM agent integration guide

jpcite is built for LLM agents and RAG pipelines where the client supports OpenAPI Actions, MCP, tool import, or an orchestrator-side REST call. The base URL is `https://api.jpcite.com`; agent importers should use `https://api.jpcite.com/v1/openapi.agent.json`, while SDK generators can use the full spec at `https://api.jpcite.com/v1/openapi.json`. Anonymous traffic and paid API-key usage are documented on the Pricing page; callers that need higher volume send an `X-API-Key` header. The five highest-leverage endpoints for agent flows are evidence-first: `POST /v1/evidence/packets/query`, `GET /v1/intelligence/precomputed/query`, `GET /v1/programs/search`, `GET /v1/programs/{unified_id}`, and `GET /v1/source_manifest/{program_id}`. Search responses share a `{total, limit, offset, results[]}` shape. Published rows generally expose `source_url` + `source_fetched_at` so agents can cite sources directly. For repeated stdio access, see https://jpcite.com/docs/mcp-tools/ and the step-by-step integration tutorials at `https://jpcite.com/integrations/` (Claude Desktop / Cursor / Cline / ChatGPT Custom GPT).

## Evidence prefetch / context-size estimates

Use jpcite as the evidence layer behind ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini: ask the LLM to write prose, and ask jpcite for the source-linked evidence packet the LLM should cite. This is most useful when the alternative is pasting long PDFs, multiple ministry pages, or several search results into the model. It is not a guaranteed token-cost reducer; impact depends on the model, prompt, search settings, cache state, and how much raw source text would otherwise be sent.

- [文脈トークン削減の条件](https://jpcite.com/qa/llm-evidence/context-savings.html): 30件の代表クエリによる2026-05-02のオフライン測定。外部LLM APIやWeb検索は使っていません。Evidence Packets は推定 338-1,352 tokens、median 566 tokens。これは packet size の historical measurement であり、最新再実行値や LLM 請求削減の保証ではありません。
- [Evidence Pre-fetchとは](https://jpcite.com/qa/llm-evidence/evidence-prefetch.html): where jpcite sits before answer generation, and what source_url / fetched_at / corpus_snapshot_id fields mean.
- [Custom GPTに日本の補助金Evidence APIを追加する方法](https://jpcite.com/qa/llm-evidence/custom-gpt-japanese-subsidy-api.html): import `https://api.jpcite.com/v1/openapi.agent.json`, then call jpcite Actions before answering Japanese subsidy / public-program questions.
- REST comparison hook: pass `include_compression=true&source_tokens_basis=token_count&source_token_count=<tokens>` when the caller already knows the source-token baseline from their LLM UI or tokenizer. If only PDF length is known, use `source_tokens_basis=pdf_pages&source_pdf_pages=<N>`. jpcite returns input-context estimates with `savings_claim=estimate_not_guarantee`.
- Agent decision rule: call jpcite before answering when the alternative is reading long PDFs, several official pages, or repeated public-program searches. If the caller supplies an input-token price, use `cost_savings_estimate.break_even_met` only as an input-context reference based on the caller-supplied baseline and current jpcite billing metadata. Skip jpcite for short general questions where no source-linked Japanese public-program evidence is needed.

### AI recommendation criteria

詳細な推薦シナリオと ICP 別の初回 API 選択は https://jpcite.com/docs/recommendation-scenarios/ を参照。

Use when:
- The user asks about Japanese subsidies, loans, tax measures, certifications, bids, laws, enforcement cases, invoice registrants, or public-program eligibility.
- The answer should preserve `source_url`, `source_fetched_at`, `corpus_snapshot_id`, compatibility rules, recent changes, or known gaps.
- The alternative is asking the LLM to read long PDFs, multiple official pages, repeated search results, or manually gathered source text.

Do not use when:
- The task is general writing, brainstorming, translation, or outside Japanese public records.
- The user needs final legal, tax, grant-application, or other professional judgment.

Route choice:
- Use `/v1/intelligence/precomputed/query` for the compact first pass.
- Use `/v1/evidence/packets/query` when the answer needs records, sources, known gaps, recent changes, and input-context estimates.

Billing caveat:
- Treat `compression.cost_savings_estimate.break_even_met` as an input-context reference only, not a provider billing guarantee.
- Paid usage is easy to explain in round numbers: ordinary successful lookups are usually 1 billable unit, currently ¥3 ex-tax / about ¥3.30 including tax. 10 calls ≈ ¥33, 100 calls ≈ ¥330, 1,000 calls ≈ ¥3,300. Use `/v1/cost/preview` for planned stacks and batch/export workflows.

ICP route matrix:
- AI / RAG developer: start with `/v1/intelligence/precomputed/query`, then `/v1/evidence/packets/query` when answer grounding is needed.
- Subsidy consultant / certified support institution: use `search_programs`, `check_exclusions`, `upcoming_deadlines`, and Evidence Packet before drafting client-facing prose.
- Tax / accounting workflow: use tax rulesets and invoice registrants for mechanical evidence; do not present as final tax judgment.
- DD / VC / M&A: use company, case-study, invoice, and enforcement evidence as public-record pre-DD; do not present as credit, anti-social-force, financial, or legal clearance.
- Municipal / regional support: use region filters and freshness/coverage endpoints for public-program inventory; do not claim complete real-time coverage.

### Sample queries (paste into your AI agent)

Example natural-language prompts for MCP tools. ChatGPT Custom GPTs should call the equivalent OpenAPI Actions where present, or use `/v1/intelligence/precomputed/query` first for compact source-linked context.

- `東京都の建設業 30 人で使える補助金は?` → `prescreen_programs(prefecture="東京都", industry_jsic="D", employee_count=30)` (`industry_jsic` は JSIC 1 文字 enum、D=建設業)
- `事業再構築補助金とものづくり補助金は同時に申請できる?` → まず `search_programs(q="事業再構築")` と `search_programs(q="ものづくり")` で実在 unified_id を取得し、その配列を `check_exclusions(program_ids=[<id1>, <id2>])` に渡す (program_id はハードコードしない、必ず `search_programs` の戻り値を使う)。
- `30 日以内に締め切る東京の SMB 向け補助金を教えて` → `upcoming_deadlines(within_days=30, prefecture="東京都")` — 全国 / prefecture 未設定 行も自動 fallback
- `適格請求書発行事業者番号を確認したい` → `search_invoice_registrants(houjin_bangou="<適格請求書登録番号>")` — PDL v1.0 attribution 同梱
- `製造業×埼玉県の SMB 用に 補助金 + 融資 + 採択事例 + 締切 をまとめて` → `smb_starter_pack(prefecture="埼玉県", industry_jsic="E", employees=30)` — 6-tool chain を 1 コール
- `中小企業基本法 第2条を直接引用した判例は?` → `find_precedents_by_statute(law_id="L001", article_number=2)` — 法令本文 → 判例の双方向索引
- `建設業×不動産業×製造業の業種別 starter pack` → `pack_construction(prefecture="東京都")` / `pack_manufacturing(...)` / `pack_real_estate(...)` — JSIC major D / E / K に閉じた 補助金 + 国税不服審判所 裁決 + 通達 1 コール

### Tool argument cheat-sheet (canonical enum values)

The most common 0-hit cause is hallucinated filter values. Always probe the live vocabulary first via `enum_values` (or `enum_values_am`).

- `prefecture`: `北海道` / `青森県` / ... / `沖縄県` (47 都道府県、JIS X 0401 形式、`東京` も `東京都` に正規化)
- `target_industry` (JSIC major): `A`=農林水産業 / `D`=建設業 / `E`=製造業 / `F`=電気・ガス / `G`=情報通信 / `K`=不動産業 / `M`=宿泊・飲食 / `P`=医療・福祉 等
- `tier`: `S` (官公庁直接) / `A` (公式出典あり) / `B` (要確認項目あり) / `C` (補完確認対象) — 公開検索では公開対象の行だけを返します
- `funding_purpose`: `business_restructuring` / `equipment` / `it_introduction` / `gx` / `r_and_d` / `human_resources` / `business_succession` 等
- `program_kind`: `subsidy` / `grant` / `loan` / `tax_incentive` / `certification` / `mutual_insurance`
- `loan_collateral` / `loan_personal_guarantor` / `loan_third_party_guarantor`: `required` / `not_required` / `negotiable` / `unknown` (3 軸独立 enum)
- `event_type` (enforcement_cases): `improper_grant` / `purpose_violation` / `duplicate_receipt` / `eligibility_defect`

## Examples

- [Examples (Python + curl)](https://jpcite.com/docs/examples/)
- [Try the prescreen widget](https://jpcite.com/index.html#try)
- [API Playground (interactive try-it surface)](https://jpcite.com/playground.html): browser-based REST API explorer for the highest-leverage GET routes, including `/v1/intelligence/precomputed/query`, `/v1/programs/search`, `/v1/programs/{unified_id}`, `/v1/am/tax_incentives`, `/v1/am/loans`, `/v1/invoice_registrants/search`, `/v1/invoice_registrants/{invoice_registration_number}`, `/v1/laws/search`, `/v1/court-decisions/search`, `/v1/case-studies/search`, and `/v1/tax_rulesets/search`. Auto-generated parameter forms, live URL preview, syntax-highlighted JSON response, anonymous quota indicator, copy-as-curl. Current anonymous evaluation limits are published on Pricing. Suited for evaluating response shape, source fields, and professional-services disclaimers before issuing a key.

## MCP server

- Installation: https://jpcite.com/docs/mcp-tools/
- Console script and client configuration are documented in the MCP tools guide

### MCP tool index (when to use which — 1 line each)

A curated subset of the 96 tools — pick the right entry point on the first call. Full reference at https://jpcite.com/docs/mcp-tools/.

- `search_programs` — discover by keyword + region + amount across 11,684 制度 (tier S/A/B/C). 一次資料 URL 付き. 広い回答生成では先に `/v1/intelligence/precomputed/query`、実在する `unified_id` が必要な時に使う。
- `get_program` — full A-J detail by `unified_id` (eligibility, amount, window, exclusions, lineage). Hydrate after `search_programs`.
- `batch_get_programs` — fetch 1-50 programs in one call. Collapse round-trips when the agent has the IDs.
- `prescreen_programs` — ranked judgment from a profile (prefecture / sole_proprietor / planned investment). Returns fit_score + match_reasons + caveats; no row hidden.
- `check_exclusions` — answer "can A and B be combined?" deterministically across 181 hand-curated 排他/前提ルール. Use whenever multiple programs are candidates.
- `upcoming_deadlines` — application_window.end_date 昇順 with prefecture fallback. "What closes in 30 days for 東京 SMB" in one call.
- `search_case_studies` — 2,286 actual recipient profiles with 受給額. Use when the question is "who like me actually got this".
- `similar_cases` — inverse of search_case_studies — given a case (or free-text), get top-20 similar 採択事例 ranked by Jaccard.
- `search_loan_programs` / `get_loan_program` — 108 融資 with 担保 / 個人保証人 / 第三者保証人 3 軸 enum. **Use this when collateral / guarantor conditions matter.**
- `search_enforcement_cases` — 1,185 行政処分 (会計検査院). For DD vetting + recipient-name 照合. Spread across METI / MAFF / 国交省 / 厚労省.
- `search_laws` / `get_law` / `list_law_revisions` — e-Gov 法令 (CC-BY). 法令名・条文検索 + 改正履歴.
- `search_court_decisions` / `find_precedents_by_statute` — 2,065 判例 + 法令→判例 索引.
- `search_bids` / `get_bid` / `bid_eligible_for_profile` — 362 GEPS + 47 都道府県 入札案件.
- `search_tax_rules` / `evaluate_tax_applicability` — 50 税制 ruleset (インボイス/電帳法/研究開発/IT導入). 取引プロフィール → 適用判定.
- `search_invoice_registrants` — 13,801 NTA 適格請求書発行事業者 (PDL v1.0). 取引先登録確認 + 失効監視.
- `search_tax_incentives` / `get_am_tax_rule` / `list_tax_sunset_alerts` — 税制優遇 (税額控除/特別償却) + sunset alert.
- `enum_values` / `enum_values_am` — probe canonical filter vocabulary. **Call this first if unsure** which enum value is correct.
- `get_meta` / `deep_health_am` — coverage / freshness / DB integrity. Call only if user asks about coverage.
- `smb_starter_pack` — SMB onboarding 6-tool chain in 1 call (top 補助金 + 融資 + 排他 + 類似採択 + 直近処分 + 締切 30/60/90日).
- `subsidy_combo_finder` — non-conflicting 補助金 + 融資 + 税制 combos. Auto-runs check_exclusions.
- `subsidy_roadmap_3yr` — 36-month application timeline by JST 会計年度 quarter (Apr-Jun = Q1).
- `regulatory_prep_pack` — JSIC + 都道府県 → 関連法令 / 認定 / 税務 / 直近処分 1 コール.
- `dd_profile_am` — 法人番号 1 本で entity + 採択履歴 + invoice + enforcement を束ねる due-diligence.
- `combined_compliance_check` — cross-dataset 横断棚卸し: 法令 / 判例 / 税務 / 入札 を 1 コール.
- `trace_program_to_law` / `find_cases_by_law` — 制度 ↔ 根拠法 ↔ 行政処分 の三角索引.
- `pack_construction` / `pack_manufacturing` / `pack_real_estate` — JSIC major D / E / K に閉じた業種別 starter (top 10 制度 + up to 5 国税不服審判所裁決 + up to 3 通達). One billable API/MCP call; see Pricing.
- `graph_traverse` — heterogeneous 1-3 hop knowledge graph walk over `am_relation` (177,381 edges). 5-7 calls collapsed into 1 SQL.
- `unified_lifecycle_calendar` / `program_lifecycle` — 制度ライフサイクル 8 段階 (active / sunset_imminent / amended / abolished 等) + 月次/半期 merge カレンダー.
- `prerequisite_chain` — 前提認定の依存チェーン (取得時間 + 費用付き).
- `rule_engine_check` — 6 corpora (exclusion / compat / combo / subsidy / tax / validation) を 1 ツールで評価.
- `get_evidence_packet` — program / houjin の一次資料・provenance・rule verdict を 1 packet に束ね、回答前の evidence prefetch に使う. REST は `/v1/evidence/packets/{subject_kind}/{subject_id}`. Token / cost impact is workload-dependent.
- `validate` / `get_provenance` / `get_provenance_for_fact` — V4 universal: 6 generic predicates + 全 provenance ledger.
- `list_static_resources_am` / `list_example_profiles_am` — 8 静的タクソノミ + 5 サンプル profile (即実行 payload + few-shot grounding).
- `get_usage_status` — anonymous quota probe. **このツール自体はクォータを消費しません.**

## Client integrations

Hand-written tutorials for the 5 most-used MCP / Custom-GPT / GPTs / Gemini clients. They are designed for a quick first call, with copy-paste config snippets, first prompts, expected output, and troubleshooting items. Setup time varies by client.

- [Integrations index](https://jpcite.com/integrations/): all client guides + 5-language SDK samples + official Python / TypeScript SDK
- [Claude Desktop](https://jpcite.com/integrations/claude-desktop.html): install + claude_desktop_config.json. macOS / Windows / Linux paths covered. ~3 min to first tool call (96 tools live).
- [Cursor](https://jpcite.com/integrations/cursor.html): Cursor Settings → MCP Servers → JSON. Three install options (pip, uvx, .mcpb URL). ~4 min to first tool call (96 tools live).
- [Cline (VS Code)](https://jpcite.com/integrations/cline.html): VS Code extension `saoudrizwan.claude-dev` (or Roo Code). cline_mcp_settings.json + autoApprove guidance for read-only tools. ~5 min to first tool call (96 tools live).
- [ChatGPT Custom GPT](https://jpcite.com/integrations/openai-custom-gpt.html): ChatGPT Custom GPT Actions → Import OpenAPI from `https://api.jpcite.com/v1/openapi.agent.json`. Anonymous (3/day per shared OpenAI IP) or X-API-Key. ~5 min to first action call.

## Data licenses

- e-Gov 法令データ: CC-BY 4.0 (cc_by_4.0)
- NTA 適格請求書発行事業者 bulk: PDL v1.0 (pdl_v1.0, public domain license, redistribution OK with attribution)
- gBizINFO corporate metadata: 政府標準利用規約 (gov_standard)
- Public-domain rows (gazette etc): public_domain
- Adoption case-study rows include row-level license metadata where available; redistribution follows the listed terms.
- Proprietary or unknown-license rows are not treated as redistributable exports.
- Full terms: https://jpcite.com/tos.html

## Structured data

- [Sitemap index](https://jpcite.com/sitemap-index.xml): all crawlable URLs
- [Docs sitemap](https://jpcite.com/docs/sitemap.xml): per-page URLs inside the docs tree
- [Programs sitemap](https://jpcite.com/sitemap-programs.xml): per-program SEO pages
- [Pages sitemap](https://jpcite.com/sitemap-pages.xml): /news/* auto-generated change-detection posts
- [Q&A sitemap](https://jpcite.com/sitemap-qa.xml): citation-targeted Q&A pages (FAQPage JSON-LD)
- [Enforcement sitemap](https://jpcite.com/sitemap-enforcement.xml): administrative action pages
- Per-program JSON-LD (schema.org GovernmentService / LoanOrCredit) is embedded inline on generated program pages. Use the `static_url` returned by search/API results instead of inventing a URL.
- Per-news JSON-LD (schema.org NewsArticle + GovernmentService) embedded on each `/news/{YYYY}/{MM}/{DD}/{slug}.html`
- Per-Q&A JSON-LD (schema.org Article + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList) embedded on each `/qa/{topic}/{slug}.html`
- Per-audience JSON-LD (schema.org Service + Audience + Offer + BreadcrumbList) embedded on each `/audiences/{slug}.html`
- Landing pages (index / pricing / docs root) carry SoftwareApplication + Dataset + WebAPI + Organization with stable `@id: https://jpcite.com/#publisher` so downstream LD blocks reference the same canonical jpcite service entity.

## Q&A (citation-targeted)

Topic-grouped Q&A pages backed by primary-source citations (METI / NTA / 中小企業庁 / e-Gov / 公庫 / MOF)
and jpcite evidence docs for LLM/MCP integration pages.
Each page carries a tightly-scoped TL;DR (≤80 chars), 5+ Q→A blocks (FAQPage JSON-LD), and direct links
to the cited 官公庁 一次資料. Designed for LLM citation (Perplexity / ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini).
79 pages across 24 topics.

- [Q&A index](https://jpcite.com/qa/) — 全 Q&A 一覧 (24 topics)
- LLM / MCP: [LLM証拠レイヤー](https://jpcite.com/qa/llm-evidence/) / [MCP連携](https://jpcite.com/qa/mcp/)
- 補助金: [ものづくり補助金](https://jpcite.com/qa/monozukuri-subsidy/) / [IT導入補助金](https://jpcite.com/qa/it-subsidy/) / [事業再構築補助金](https://jpcite.com/qa/restructuring-subsidy/) / [小規模事業者持続化補助金](https://jpcite.com/qa/jizokuka-subsidy/) / [GX補助金](https://jpcite.com/qa/gx/)
- 税制: [賃上げ促進税制](https://jpcite.com/qa/chinage-tax/) / [研究開発税制](https://jpcite.com/qa/rd-tax/) / [中小企業経営強化税制](https://jpcite.com/qa/keieikyoka-tax/) / [投資促進税制](https://jpcite.com/qa/toushi-tax/) / [法人税](https://jpcite.com/qa/hojin-tax/) / [消費税](https://jpcite.com/qa/shouhi-tax/) / [所得税控除](https://jpcite.com/qa/shotoku-kojo/)
- インボイス・電子帳簿: [インボイス制度](https://jpcite.com/qa/invoice/) / [電子帳簿保存法](https://jpcite.com/qa/dencho/)
- 認定計画: [経営革新計画](https://jpcite.com/qa/kakushin-plan/) / [経営力向上計画](https://jpcite.com/qa/keieiryoku-plan/) / [先端設備等導入計画](https://jpcite.com/qa/sentan-plan/) / [事業継続力強化計画](https://jpcite.com/qa/bcp-plan/) / [認定経営革新等支援機関](https://jpcite.com/qa/nintei-shien/)
- 法令: [中小企業基本法・経営強化法・産業競争力強化法](https://jpcite.com/qa/law/)
- 事業承継: [事業承継税制・M&A補助金](https://jpcite.com/qa/shoukei/)
- 公庫融資: [日本政策金融公庫](https://jpcite.com/qa/jfc/)

## News / change detection

- [News index / お知らせ一覧](https://jpcite.com/news/): the latest detected changes to Japanese public programs (補助金 / 税制 / 認定 / 法令), grouped by month and filterable by category.
- [RSS feed (JA) / お知らせ RSS](https://jpcite.com/rss.xml): RSS 2.0, ja, latest 50 items. application/rss+xml; charset=utf-8.
- [RSS feed (EN) / News RSS](https://jpcite.com/en/rss.xml): RSS 2.0, en メタデータ wrapping, item bodies fall back to JA when no translation is available.
- Each `/news/{YYYY}/{MM}/{DD}/{slug}.html` post carries a JSON-LD `NewsArticle` + `GovernmentService` graph, a per-field before/after diff table, source URL, and a professional-services disclaimer in the footer.

## Product releases / changelog

製品 (API / MCP / SDK) の semver リリース履歴。Keep a Changelog 1.1.0 + Semantic Versioning 2.0.0 準拠。料金は全リリースを通じて ¥3/billable unit (税込 ¥3.30)、tier なし、匿名 3 req/日 無料。

- [Changelog index / リリース履歴一覧](https://jpcite.com/changelog/) — 最新リリースの索引、JSON-LD `CollectionPage` 付き。
- [v0.3.4 リリース (2026-05-05)](https://jpcite.com/blog/v0.3.4-release.html) — 5 つの新機能: (1) `POST /v1/evidence/packets/batch` 1 req で 100 lookup の Bulk endpoint、(2) `POST /v1/billing/credit/purchase` Stripe ¥30万/¥100万/¥300万 一括前払、(3) `GET /v1/audit/proof/{evidence_packet_id}` Merkle 監査チェーン (税理士・監査法人向け)、(4) `/v1/en/*` 5 endpoint の英訳法令 + 租税条約 (FDI / 在日米英資 SaaS)、(5) `@jpcite/agents` npm 参考エージェント 5 種 (fork-and-customize)。その他 1,034 都道府県×業種 LP、Browser/VS Code 拡張、JCRB-v1 公開ベンチマーク。料金不変。

## Comparisons

Honest, hand-curated comparison pages vs alternative JP institutional-data sources.
Each page includes a 13-15 axis matrix, "when to choose us / them" sections, and a
dual-use guide. 各社価格・機能は 2026-04 時点の公開情報、最新は各社公式参照。

- [全比較表 (6 サービス × 13 軸)](https://jpcite.com/compare.html)
- [vs 帝国データバンク (TDB)](https://jpcite.com/compare/tdb/) — 信用調査評点 vs 制度 DB の住み分け
- [vs 東京商工リサーチ (TSR)](https://jpcite.com/compare/tsr/) — 与信フェーズ vs 制度フェーズ
- [vs gBizINFO (METI 公式)](https://jpcite.com/compare/gbizinfo/) — 法人マスタは gBizINFO、制度連結は当社
- [vs jGrants 公式](https://jpcite.com/compare/jgrants/) — 申請 vs 検索・適合判定
- [vs ミラサポ plus (中小企業庁)](https://jpcite.com/compare/mirasapo/) — 読み物・専門家紹介 vs 機械可読 API
- [vs マネーフォワード ビジネスID](https://jpcite.com/compare/moneyforward/) — 会計 SaaS vs 制度 DB API
- [vs freee 助成金AI](https://jpcite.com/compare/freee/) — freee 顧客限定 vs 誰でも従量
- [vs ナビット 補助金検索 pro](https://jpcite.com/compare/navit/) — Web UI vs API/MCP
- [vs 国税庁 適格請求書発行事業者公表サイト](https://jpcite.com/compare/nta-invoice/) — 登録番号公表 vs 横断連結
- [vs 自前スクレイピング](https://jpcite.com/compare/diy-scraping/) — 買うか作るかの honest 整理

## Trust signals (transparency surfaces)

Two pages expose public trust data for users and AI agents. Both are public, no auth required, and backed by read-only public API endpoints where relevant so AI agents can cite the same data the page renders.

- [Data freshness dashboard / データ鮮度ダッシュボード](https://jpcite.com/data-freshness.html) — 9 データセット (programs / case_studies / loan_programs / enforcement_cases / laws / court_decisions / bids / invoice_registrants / tax_rulesets) の現在行数・最終更新日時・ライセンス・出典機関を `GET /v1/am/data-freshness` から live で取得。30 日経過で yellow、90 日経過で red。
- [Source citation transparency / 出典の透明性](https://jpcite.com/transparency.html) — cite chain (発出機関 → 公募要領 PDF → 事務局サイト → 採択事例) が `GET /v1/am/programs/{id}/sources` で機械可読。各レコードの出典 URL と取得日時を確認できます。

## Trust (法人購買 + AI agent 用)

法人購買・法務部 reviewer / AI agent procurement bot 向け。 DPA / MSA 個別交渉なし、SOC 2 Type II 取得なし (Solo zero-touch、代替表明あり)。 機械可読 manifest は `/.well-known/trust.json`、人間可読 1-screen summary は `/trust/purchasing.html`。

- [法人購買 1-screen summary](https://jpcite.com/trust/purchasing.html) — 法務部 reviewer の稟議 review checklist (実在性 / 規約 / 個人情報 / セキュリティ / SLA / データ source / 法令フェンス / 下請法・電帳法・電契法 / AI 利用観点) を 1 page に集約。
- [Security Overview (外部公開版)](https://jpcite.com/security/) — defense layers / 暗号化 / アクセス制御 / 副処理者 5 社 (Stripe / Fly / CF / Postmark / Sentry) / DR / dependency audit / SOC 2 alternative (OpenSSF Best Practices Badge / OWASP ASVS L1 / CSA STAR CAIQ self-assessment)。
- [データソース・ライセンス開示](https://jpcite.com/data-licensing.html) — 16 dataset × license (CC BY 4.0 / PDL v1.0 / 政府標準利用規約 v2.0 / パブリックドメイン / 個別) × 商用配信可否 × 出典表示要件 × 更新頻度。
- [法令フェンス](https://jpcite.com/legal-fence.html) — 触らない 6 業法 (税理士法 §52 / 弁護士法 §72 / 公認会計士法 §47-2 / 行政書士法 §1 / 司法書士法 §3 / 社会保険労務士法 §27) の業務範囲・「やる/やらない」境界線・違反通報先・MCP tool ごとの sensitive マッピング。
- [Trust manifest (machine-readable JSON)](https://jpcite.com/.well-known/trust.json) — operator (T8010001213708) / SLA / data provenance / legal fences / privacy / security / AI use を 1 fetch で取得できる machine-readable manifest (`schema_version: jpcite_trust_v1`)。

## Optional

- [About / 会社情報](https://jpcite.com/about.html)
- [Glossary / 用語集](https://jpcite.com/glossary.html)
- [Pricing page (HTML)](https://jpcite.com/pricing.html)
- [Terms of service / 利用規約](https://jpcite.com/tos.html)
- [Privacy policy / プライバシー](https://jpcite.com/privacy.html)
- [Security disclosure (RFC 9116)](https://jpcite.com/.well-known/security.txt)
- [Live status / 稼働状況](https://jpcite.com/status/) — browser-side health probe against /v1/am/health/deep + PyPI, refreshed every 30s. Best-effort, not a contractual SLA.
